candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label from the income statement candidate list.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported revenue line from candidates. Although 'Net revenue' also appears, the candidate list already contains a correct top-line label, so no outside-candidate selection was needed.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line; exact match for cost of sales/direct production costs.
Alternative COGS label that may be used in some years.

variables.notes: R:c.Included both exact COGS labels as a priority list because they appear to represent the same concept across years.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.
Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; included in XSGA per rule so that XSGA-XRD excludes it.
Possible overhead bucket, but less informative than the more explicit SG&A rows already present.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. Selected explicit overhead components above EBIT. Included 'Research and development costs' in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well because it is separately reported above EBIT and should be removed later via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD. Excluded depreciation/amortization, write-downs, balancing rows, and totals.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Write down of capitalized development charges
candidates.why: R&D-related but more impairment/write-down in nature, not core periodic R&D expense.
Related to R&D assets but not the primary dedicated R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Used the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense row only. Excluded write-downs and amortization because they are not the core research and development expense line.

candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest-expense label and preferable to broader finance-cost labels when available.
Broader finance-cost row, but could overlap with 'Interest expenses'; avoided to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component, but likely already embedded in broader interest rows in overlapping years.

variables.notes: Chose the most direct recurring interest-expense row and avoided combining it with 'Interest expenses and similar items' or lease-interest rows because the preview suggests overlap in some years, which would risk double counting.

candidates.why: Best available equity line from the balance sheet candidate list.
Same concept with alternate capitalization; useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is shown in the preview, so used total equity as the BE mapping per rule. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.

candidates.why: Direct NCI/minority interest balance-sheet label, but should not be used when BE is mapped to total equity to avoid double counting.
Income statement flow item, not appropriate for balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Income statement total, not the preferred balance-sheet stock measure.

variables.notes: Set to empty because BE uses 'Total equity'/'Total Equity'. Per rule, when total equity is used for BE, MIB should be left empty to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.
